snippet.title: Jay Chou 周杰倫【I Do】Official Music Video
snippet.description:
I Do     
詞：方文山 Vincent Fang  曲：周杰倫 Jay Chou

看著你  迎著風  坐在海邊
那瞬間  像認識  你好多年
Baby 想像你在未來的畫面
早遇見  我們一定提早相戀

我告白  紅著臉  的那一天
多年後  變成了  相戀的紀念
在我的生命中  感謝有你的出現
你的無名指上有我承諾的永遠

這一刻最美  的時光
是你穿婚紗  的模樣
婚禮前將我  領帶繫上
穿上你挑的  白西裝

這一刻最美  的時光
是你走在我  的身旁
紅毯上誓言  浪漫綻放
在幸福停靠  的地方
愛的模樣  我們遇上  最美的那時光

snippet.title: Supergirl | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Summer after high school, when we first met
We'd make out in your Mustang to Radiohead
And on my eighteenth birthday, we got matching tattoos
Used to steal your parents' liquor and climb to the roof
Talked about our future like we had a clue
Never planned that one day, I'd be losing you

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away

[Verse 2]
I was June, and you were my Johnny Cash
Never one without the other, we made a pact
Sometimes when I miss you, I put those records on, woah
Someone said you had your tattoo removed
Saw you downtown, singing the blues
It's time to face the music, I'm no longer your muse

Pelakun:
1. Emma Ma’embong
2. Bietchly, Joe Max, Dunstan dan Ahmad Amirul amin.
3. Donny Garam Manis & Aganth (Pelakun Antagonis)
4. Nathania Umang, Quinzy Ritchelleo, Olympiuz Rozarlen, Fransiskus Minggang dan Frankie Men (pelakun Kanak-kanak)
5. Ayah Yazid dari Pertubuhan Kebajikan dan Dakwah Islamiyah SeMalaysia (PEKIDA)
Sponser / Penaja:
1. Terabai Menua
2. All In pup & karaoke
3. Zen Daya Sdn Bhd
4. Fox Sport Centre
5. Quaxa
6. Sandhu Lee Goh & Co
7. Tung Huat Plantations
8. Kennedy Electrical
9. Seri Batu Wong General Contractor
Kaban Sampai Mati.  

Mensia Di Dunya Ngaga Diri Enda Meda  
Nuan Datai Sangkai Taja AKu Enda Minta  
Lebuh Aku Labuh Nuan Narit Jari   
Aku Bediri Enggau Andal Ati   
Verse 2
Dunya Ku Petang Nuan Nyadi Penerang  
Kelambang Singkang  Singkang Kaki Balang 
Sida Iya Ketawa Meda Aku Merinsa  
Nuan Datai Nanya Ngasuh Ati Gaga  
(Pre-Chorus)
Orang Bukai Nyau Keji Ngemeli   
Nuan Tetap Ditisi Enda Ninggal Ku Kediri  
(Chorus 1)
Nuan Kaban Aku Sampai Mati   
Bakih Aku Bejalai Kini-Kini   
Tusah Enggau Senang Sama Disepi  
Tua Belagu Merindang Ati   
(Chorus 2)
Nuan Kaban Aku Sampai Mati    
Tetap Begulai Taja Ribut Kudi   
Taja Orang Begedi Pedis Ati     
Nuan Enda Kala Keji Enda Kala Nuan Rari 
(Verse 3)
Mayuh Orang Ngelabuhka Pangan Diri  
Nuan Ngangkatka Ku Tegap Bediri  
Taja Miskin Reta Kaya Budi Basa   
Enggau Ati Tuchi Ukai Pura-Pura   
(Bridge)
Tua Nyabak Tua Ketawa    
Dibaruh Langit Ti Sama    
Taja Beserara Tua Ba Dunya   
Begulai Tua Ila Ba Serga 
(Chorus)  
Nuan Kaban Aku Sampai Mati   
Bakih Aku Bejalai Kini-Kini   
Tusah Enggau Senang Sama Disepi  
Tua Belagu Merindang Ati   
(Chorus)
Nuan Kaban Aku Sampai Mati     
Tetap Begulai Taja Ribut Kudi   
Taja Pan Sida Ngemedis Menyati
Nuan Enda Ninggal Pegi Nuan kaban Sampai mati
(Outro )
Maya Padam Seput Ku Dudi Hari   
Nama Nuan Ku Ingat Di Ati   
Wooo Wooo Wooo    
Kaban Sampai Mati
Kaban sampai mati
Sampai mati    
    
Lagu / Lirik: Embat Lala

Sahabat Sampai Mati 
(Verse 1)
Di kala dunia menutup mata,  
Kau hadir tenang tanpa diminta,  
Saat ku jatuh kau hulur tangan,  
Tanpa bicara kau beri harapan.  
(Verse 2)
Dalam gelap kau jadi cahaya,  
Saat ku hilang arah dan daya,  
Waktu menertawakan langkah ini,  
Kau tetap berdiri tak pernah pergi. 
(Pre-Chorus)Bila ramai berlari menjauh,  
Kau tetap di sisi tak pernah surut. 
(Chorus)
Kau lah sahabat Ku Sampai mati 
Menemani hingga akhir nanti  
Dalam luka tawa bersemi  
Kita menyanyi melawan sunyi  
Kau lah sahabat Ku Sampai mati   
Dalam Badai Kau Tak Bersembunyi 
Bila Dunia Kejam Dan Ngeri 
Kau Tetap Setia Tak Pernah Lari  
(Verse 3)
Saat ramai menjatuh sesama,  
Kau angkat aku tanpa bertanya,  
Walau miskin harta kaya jiwa,  
Kau hadir tulus, tanpa pura-pura. 
(Bridge)Kita menangis kita tertawa,  
Di bawah langit yang sama,  
Biarlah waktu memisah raga,  
Tapi takkan pisah jiwa kita.  
(Chorus)
Kau lah sahabat Ku Sampai mati 
Menemani hingga akhir nanti  
Dalam luka tawa bersemi  
Kita menyanyi melawan sunyi
  
Kau lah sahabat Ku Sampai mati   
Dalam Badai Kau Tak Bersembunyi
Walau dunia berpaling pergi
Kau tetap disisi kau sahabat sampai mati
(Outro)
Bila nafasku berhenti nanti,  
Namamu tetap ku ingat di hati. 
Wooo Woooo 
Sahabat sampai mati 
Sahabat sampai mati   
Sampai mati.      
Lagu / Lirik: Embat Lala

snippet.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Final Trailer
snippet.description:
Watch the new trailer for The Devil Wears Prada 2 with original song “Runway” performed by Lady Gaga and Doechii. Get tickets now and experience the film only in theaters May 1: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel—Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as “Lily” and “Irv” from the first film. 
 
“The Devil Wears Prada 2” is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

snippet.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
snippet.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

➤➤ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
➤➤ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


➤➤Links:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://share.epidemicsound.com/1xis5q/?playlist=uad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y

🎵 Copyrighted music licensed from Lickd. https://lickd.co

While My Guitar Gently Weeps (Live from Madison Square Garden, New York, U.S.A, 1971 / 2009 Remaster) by George Harrison, https://t.lickd.co/l/oOPdvzdZ73p

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

snippet.title: Katy Perry - The One That Got Away (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Katy Perry - The One That Got Away
Stream/Download:

(Lyrics):
[Verse 1]
Summer after high school, when we first met
We'd make out in your Mustang to Radiohead
And on my eighteenth birthday, we got matching tattoos
Used to steal your parents' liquor and climb to the roof
Talked about our future like we had a clue
Never planned that one day, I'd be losing you

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Verse 2]
I was June, and you were my Johnny Cash
Never one without the other, we made a pact
Sometimes when I miss you, I put those records on, woah
Someone said you had your tattoo removed
Saw you downtown, singing the blues
It's time to face the music, I'm no longer your muse

[Chorus]
But in another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Post-Chorus]
The one
The one
The one
The one that got away

[Bridge]
All this money can't buy me a time machine, no
Can't replace you with a million rings, no
I should've told you what you meant to me, woah
'Cause now I pay the price

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away (The one that got away)

The one (The one)
The one (The one)
The one (The one)

I would make you stay

The one that got away

snippet.title: Bruno Mars - Risk It All (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Bruno Mars - Risk It All (Lyrics)

Follow Bruno Mars:
https://instagram.com/brunomars
https://facebook.com/brunomars
https://x.com/brunomars

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
For just the chance to win your heart
You could set the bar beyond the stars
I'll do anything, anything you ask me to

[Pre-Chorus]
Say you want the moon
Watch me learn to fly
Ain't no mountain you could point to
I wouldn't climb

[Chorus]
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you

[Verse 2]
To hold your hand and call you mine
I'm tryna be your man 'til the end of time
Oh, I'll do anything, anything you ask me to

[Pre-Chorus]
I would run through a fire
Just to be by your side
If your heart's on the line
You could take mine

[Chorus]
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you

[Bridge]
I would swim across the sea just to show you
Sacrifice my life just to hold you
I could go on and on
To prove that you belong here in my arms

[Pre-Chorus]
Say you want the moon
Watch me learn to fly
Ain't no mountain you could point to
I wouldn't climb

[Chorus]
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you

snippet.title: EzHaRHaNzE - Dari Bawah (Official Audio + Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Ada benda kita simpan…
tak semua orang nampak, tak semua orang faham.
.
Kadang kita nampak kuat,
padahal dalam diam sedang lawan macam-macam.
.
Lagu ni bukan sekadar bunyi…
ini rasa yang tak sempat diluahkan,
ini cerita yang mungkin sama dengan hidup kau.
.
Kalau kau pernah jatuh,
pernah penat,
tapi masih terus jalan…
ini untuk kau.
.
Terima kasih sebab dengar sampai habis 🤍🙏🏻
.
.
#Ezharhanze #FYPMalaysia #ViralMalaysia #LaguJiwa #UntukKau #CeritaHidup #DalamDiam #RasaIni #LaguBaru #MusicMalaysia #SupportLocal #IndieArtist #LocalArtist #LaguSedih #LaguFeeling #DeepFeeling #RealTalk #KisahHidup #HidupIni #JiwaKacau #LuahanHati #Lagu2026 #YouTubeMusic #MusicVideo #TrendingNow #ForYou #FYP #MalaysiaMusic #RasaYangSama #KauFaham #DengarSampaiHabis #JanganMengalah #TerusKuat #Bangkit #CeritaKita #HatiBicara #DalamHati #KuatDalamDiam #LawanDiri #KeepGoing #StayStrong #MotivasiHidup #PerjalananHidup #SuaraHati #HealingMusic #MusicVibes #ViralLagu #TrendingMalaysia #NewRelease #SongMalaysia

Yeah…
From the bottom…
Ezharhanze

Aku mula dari bawah, tak ada siapa pandang
Langkah kecil tiap hari walau jalan penuh halang
Dulu orang ketawa, kata aku takkan ke mana
Sekarang aku bangun, tunjuk siapa sebenarnya

Tak pakai cerita kosong, semua ni real talk
Siang malam aku hustle, tak pernah nak stop
Tak ada jalan mudah, semua kena usaha
Jatuh bangun sendiri, baru kenal erti maruah

Hidup bukan senang, semua kena rasa
Telan pahit dulu baru faham nikmat bahagia
Apa yang aku lalui aku simpan jadi bara
Jadi api dalam diri, teruskan langkah ke depan

Aku jalan… pelan-pelan…
Tak tahu… mana arah…
Tapi aku… tetap jalan…
Walau dunia… tak dengar…

Dari bawah… aku naik…
Walau orang… tak nampak…
Aku cuba… hari-hari…
Sampai mimpi… jadi nyata…

Walau dunia gelap, aku tetap kejar
Tak tunggu peluang, aku cipta sendiri
Jatuh berkali-kali, aku bangun lagi

Ramai datang bila aku mula naik
Dulu masa susah, bayang pun tak nampak baik
Itu semua biasa, aku dah mengerti
Yang tinggal di sisi cuma yang setia di hati

Aku tak lupa asal, aku tak lupa jalan
Setiap luka lama jadi sumber kekuatan
Dari bawah aku naik, bukan sekadar kata
Ini suara hidup aku, ini cerita nyata

Kadang aku penat… kadang aku jatuh…
Tapi aku ingat… kenapa aku mula dulu…

Aku jalan… pelan-pelan…
Tak tahu… mana arah…
Tapi aku… tetap jalan…
Walau dunia… tak dengar…

Dari bawah… aku naik…
Walau orang… tak nampak…
Aku cuba… hari-hari…
Sampai mimpi… jadi nyata…

Yeah…
Masih jalan…
Takkan berhenti…
